title: calochilus grandiflorus
intro: Calochilus grandiflorus, also known as the Golden Sun Orchid, is a rare and endangered terrestrial orchid native to Australia's eastern coast. This plant has been traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Golden Sun Orchid is believed to have various health benefits, including aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. The plant's herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine, however, its use is strictly regulated due to its endangered status.
